items.title: Ask HN: Should AI agents have their own legal entities?
items.summary:
When an agent spends money or creates liability, who's responsible? 
Personal accounts are risky and manual LLCs don't really scale? Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47984321 Points: 1 # Comments: 1

items.title: Show HN: I made an AI task scheduling app
items.summary: I just wanted to have an AI do research for me so I don't waste time on it. You can leverage your time by letting the AI search and evaluate your favorite stocks price every morning, searching for startup ideas every hour and so on while you focus on something else. I also made the AI customizable with persistent memory so you can give it a 'Jarvis' feel or whatever you desire. The limit is your imagination.  This is my first attempt in any kind of "app". Every advice is appreciated, good or bad please be brutally honest with me. Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47983643 Points: 1 # Comments: 0
